user: Create a pygame programm to deisplay "Hello world ont a 600*800 screen"
assistant: As an AI language model, I do not have the capability to develop a program or application. However, I can provide you with the necessary code. Here's the Python code to display "Hello World" on a 600x800 screen using Pygame:

```
import pygame

# Initialize Pygame
pygame.init()

# Set the display size
screen = pygame.display.set_mode((600, 800))

# Set the screen caption
pygame.display.set_caption("Hello World")

# Set the font object
font = pygame.font.Font(None, 36)

# Create the text surface
text_surface = font.render("Hello World", True, (255, 255, 255))

# Center the text surface
text_rect = text_surface.get_rect(center=(300, 400))

# Loop until program exit
while True:
    # Check for events
    for event in pygame.event.get():
        if event.type == pygame.QUIT:
            pygame.quit()
            quit()

    # Fill the screen with black
    screen.fill((0, 0, 0))

    # Add text to the screen
    screen.blit(text_surface, text_rect)

    # Update the display
    pygame.display.update()
```

This code sets the display size to 600x800 and the caption to "Hello World." It creates a font object and a text surface with the message "Hello World," which is centered on the screen. The while loop runs until the user closes the program, filling the screen with black and blitting the text surface to the screen. Finally, the display is updated to show the text.
